summary: Frontend-only end-to-end testing of Cholak Viktoriia mobile-first landing page (414x896 viewport). All 11 requested features verified successfully with zero console errors.

test_results.hero_headline_UA: PASS - 'Реклама, що повертає вкладене' rendered after SplitText animation
test_results.hero_headline_EN_switch: PASS - 'Ads that pay you back' after clicking lang-en, returns to UA on lang-uk
test_results.all_sections_render: PASS - top-nav, hero, stats, about, services, process, cases, testimonials, faq, cta-section, footer all visible
test_results.stat_counters: PASS - stat-0 (70+), stat-1 (12M₴), stat-2 (4.2×), stat-3 (38%) all animated to target on scroll
test_results.services_accordion: PASS - svc-1 toggles 'open' class on click, collapses on second click

critical_code_review_comments: App.js (~405 lines) is reasonable but consider splitting section components into separate files under /src/sections/ for maintainability if more sections are added
Inline styles are heavily used; could be migrated to CSS classes for consistency, but acceptable for a landing page
The Cursor component is rendered on mobile too (hidden via CSS); minor perf nit but no functional impact
context_for_next_testing_agent: Landing page tested on mobile viewport 414x896. All 11 acceptance criteria pass. No backend involved. Use REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL (https://conversion-magnet.preview.emergentagent.com) without /api prefix. SplitText animation needs ~2s settle, Counter animation triggers via IntersectionObserver on scroll-into-view (~2s to complete). Language switch re-triggers SplitText so allow ~2.5s after lang button click before reading headline.
